prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, let’s go—you’ve got this! That task you’ve been avoiding? It’s just a challenge waiting for you to tackle it. Break it down into smaller steps, take a deep breath, and start with the first one. You don’t have to be perfect—you just have to *start*. Every minute you spend on it is progress, and progress is what matters. Think about how good it’ll feel when it’s done and off your plate. You’re capable, you’re prepared, and you’re stronger than you think. Go crush it!
